medications: Tab. Terbin-AF (Terbinafine 250mg) Dose: 1 tablet once daily.
Soln. Amorolf-Oliq (Amorolfine 5% Nail Lacquer) App: Apply once weekly to affected nails.
summary: Patient presents with affected nails (great toenail & other toes) showing yellow-brown discoloration, subungual hyperkeratosis, distal onycholysis, and nail bed separation. Treatment includes Tab. Terbin-AF (Terbinafine 250mg) 1 tablet once daily for 12 weeks, and Soln. Amorolf-Oliq (Amorolfine 5% Nail Lacquer) applied once weekly to affected nails after filing.
